message:
fix(storage): record Reopened event when transitioning from terminal to non-terminal status

Track whether an issue was in a terminal status before the update, and
emit an EventType::Reopened event when transitioning from a terminal
status (e.g. Closed) to a non-terminal one (e.g. Open). Previously,
reopening an issue only cleared closed_at without recording any event,
making it invisible in the issue history.

Also restructure the else branch to nest the closed_at clearing inside
the terminal-to-non-terminal check for clearer control flow.

New test: reopen records reopened event verifies the full close-then-reopen
cycle produces a Reopened event in the event log.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
